name: @sqleasy/dart-engine
description: Turbo shim for the Dart engine port (pub.dev: sqleasy_engine). Pulls NO node dependencies — it exists only so turbo can schedule and cache the Dart toolchain as a task-graph node. The real package is defined by pubspec.yaml.

scripts.test: dart pub get && dart test --exclude-tags integration
scripts.conformance:integration: dart pub get && dart test --tags integration
